TE · Ways of Working

Working in a Matrix

Seven situations. One way of working.

The throughline

Success in a matrix comes from alignment, not authority.

A field guide for getting cross-functional work done at TE. Pick the situation you're in — each one shows what may feel different, how TE works, the do's and don'ts, and who to ask.
